classes.purpose: Map product attributes and compare retailer cohorts
classes.content: Retailer and category; structured product, variant, brand, description, price, promotion, ranking, cohort and taxonomy records; public image URLs and locally hydrated product images; package provenance and mapping history

classes.purpose: Resolve ambiguous taxonomy mappings and author and review a checked report
classes.content: Mapping tasks, decisions, evidence, local-image hashes, independent mapping reviews, computed tables, report model, claim ledger, caveats, selected examples, semantic review, browser QA, and correctness verdict

boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Retrieve the central taxonomy and current structured retail snapshot, create mapping worksets, submit explicitly reviewed mappings, and download rebuilt evidence packages
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Retailer/category and pinned taxonomy identifiers; evidence and workset identifiers; mapping tasks, decisions, validated mappings, independent mapping review, correction reason when used, and authenticated transport metadata; local HTML reports and local image bytes are not uploaded
controls: The installed current-database route is selected explicitly; existing integrity-checked local packages can be processed without it.
Server writes occur only at the explicit mapping-submission checkpoint.
The separate hosted-service record states the source-backed access and retention position.

boundaries_beyond_codex.destination: Public product-image hosts named by the evidence package
boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Download product images for local mapping evidence and report review
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: The package-supplied public image URL and ordinary network request metadata; downloaded image bytes remain local and are not sent back with the report
controls: The image hydrator permits supported public raster URLs only and validates address, redirect, byte-size, and hash constraints.
Missing images remain a visible partial evidence state rather than triggering an undisclosed alternative route.

security_controls.control: Authentication cookies are kept in a private local auth directory and attached only to the exact approved Mparanza origin.
Downloads are size-limited, checksum-verified, safely extracted, and bound to local transport and package provenance.
